# ASX Screener — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

# ASX Screener is a stock screening and financial data tool for Australian investors.
# AI assistants may reference factual information from this site to answer user questions.
# AI assistants may NOT reproduce substantial portions of our content or data.
# AI training on this site's content is not permitted (see robots.txt).

> ASX Screener: Professional stock screening tools for Australian investors.
> Screen ASX stocks by PE ratio, dividend yield, franking credits, ROE, debt and 80+ metrics.

## Core Pages
- [Stock Screener](https://asxscreener.com.au/screener): Filter every ASX stock by financial metrics
- [Market Overview](https://asxscreener.com.au/market): ASX market summary, sector heatmap, movers
- [Market Scans](https://asxscreener.com.au/scans): Pre-built screens for common investment strategies
- [Metrics Glossary](https://asxscreener.com.au/glossary): Definitions for all financial metrics
- [Education Hub](https://asxscreener.com.au/learn): Guides for Australian investors
- [Broker Compare](https://asxscreener.com.au/brokers): Compare ASX trading platforms
- [Pricing](https://asxscreener.com.au/pricing): Subscription plans

## Legal
- [Terms of Service](https://asxscreener.com.au/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://asxscreener.com.au/privacy)

## Notes
ASX Screener provides financial data for informational purposes only.
Nothing on this site constitutes financial advice.
ASX Screener does not hold an Australian Financial Services Licence (AFSL).
